back: The internet is a global network that connects devices together so they can communicate and share data.

front: What is the world wide web?
back: The world wide web is a collection of websites and web pages that you access using the internet.

front: What is the difference between the internet and the world wide web?
back: The internet connects devices together, while the world wide web is a service that lets you access websites and web pages.

front: Give examples of devices connected to the internet.
back: Laptops, smartphones, tablets, games consoles and smart TVs.

front: Give examples of things on the world wide web.
back: Web pages, websites, online videos, online shopping sites and social media.

front: Is the world wide web the same as the internet?
back: No. The world wide web uses the internet, but they are not the same thing.

front: Give one example of something that uses the internet but is not part of the world wide web.
